updates.summary: Aligned current release posture, install commands, published artifact table, roadmap wording, architecture diagram versions, and citation example with the published v0.0.3-alpha public alpha state.
Pinned the install command to the current PyPI pre-release so pip does not miss the alpha package.
Added v0.0.3-alpha allowed-claims section with published artifact, verifier-scope, FreeTSA recovery, and issue #7 limitation wording.
Changed candidate wording to published alpha prerelease and added post-release FreeTSA recovery note without redefining the frozen tag.

current_public_state.python_package: attestplane==0.0.3a0 on PyPI as a pre-release
current_public_state.open_issue: #7 remains open as a design question
